pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Enhances thwu1's 10L Int5-MLP stack with XSA in late layers plus layerwise value residuals/gated attention, EMA averaging, and AdamW-based TTT.
techniques: XSA on last layers to orthogonally remove self-value bias
Layerwise value residuals and gating to modulate the raw input signal
EMA weights combined with AdamW-powered test-time training
